        left: 0;
        width: 100%;
        height: 100%;
        background: rgba(0, 0, 0, 0.85);
        display: flex;
        align-items: center;
        justify-content: center;
        z-index: 9999;
        backdrop-filter: blur(5px);
      }

      .login-box {
        background: var(--bg-chat);
        padding: 40px;
        border-radius: 12px;
        width: 100%;
        max-width: 400px;
        box-shadow: 0 10px 25px rgba(0, 0, 0, 0.5);
        text-align: center;
        border: 1px solid var(--border-color);
      }

      .login-title {
        color: var(--color-primary);
        font-size: 24px;
        font-weight: 800;
        margin-bottom: 20px;
        letter-spacing: -0.5px;
      }

      .login-input {
        width: 100%;
        padding: 12px 16px;
        margin-bottom: 15px;
        border: 2px solid var(--border-color);
        background: var(--bg-input);
        color: var(--text-primary);
        border-radius: 8px;
        font-size: 16px;
        outline: none;
      }

      .login-input:focus {
        border-color: var(--color-primary);
      }

      .login-btn {
        width: 100%;
        padding: 12px;
        background: var(--color-primary);
        color: white;
        border: none;
        border-radius: 8px;
        font-size: 16px;
        font-weight: 600;
        cursor: pointer;
        transition: all 0.2s;
      }

      .login-btn:hover {
        background: var(--color-primary-hover);
      }

      /* CONFIRM MODAL */
      .confirm-modal-backdrop {
        position: fixed;
        top: 0;
        left: 0;
        width: 100%;
        height: 100%;
        background: rgba(0, 0, 0, 0.7);
        display: none;
        align-items: center;
        justify-content: center;
        z-index: 10000;
      }

      .confirm-modal-backdrop.active {
        display: flex;
      }

      .confirm-modal {
        background: var(--bg-chat);
        padding: 24px;
        border-radius: 12px;
        width: 90%;
        max-width: 320px;
        box-shadow: 0 10px 25px rgba(0, 0, 0, 0.5);
        border: 1px solid var(--border-color);
        animation: fadeIn 0.2s ease-out;
      }

      .confirm-title {
        font-size: 18px;
        font-weight: 600;
        color: var(--text-primary);
        margin-bottom: 12px;
      }

      .confirm-text {
        color: var(--text-secondary);
        font-size: 14px;
        margin-bottom: 20px;
      }

      .confirm-actions {
        display: flex;
        gap: 10px;
        justify-content: flex-end;
      }

      .btn-modal {
        padding: 8px 16px;
        border-radius: 6px;
        font-size: 14px;
        font-weight: 600;
        cursor: pointer;
        border: none;
      }

      .btn-cancel {
        background: transparent;
        color: var(--text-secondary);
        border: 1px solid var(--border-color);
      }

      .btn-confirm {
        background: var(--color-primary);
        color: white;
      }

      /* SIDEBAR FOOTER & USER PROFILE */
      .sidebar-footer {
        padding: 16px;
        border-top: 1px solid var(--border-color);
        background: rgba(0, 0, 0, 0.03);
        margin-top: auto;
      }

      [data-theme="dark"] .sidebar-footer {
        background: rgba(0, 0, 0, 0.2);
      }

      .user-profile {
        display: flex;
        align-items: center;
        gap: 12px;
        padding: 8px;
        background: rgba(0, 0, 0, 0.05);
        border-radius: 8px;
      }

      [data-theme="dark"] .user-profile {
        background: rgba(255, 255, 255, 0.05);
      }

      .user-avatar {
        width: 36px;
        height: 36px;
        border-radius: 50%;
        background: var(--color-primary);
        color: white;
        display: flex;
        align-items: center;
        justify-content: center;
        font-weight: 700;
        font-size: 14px;
      }

      .user-info {
        flex: 1;
        overflow: hidden;
      }

      .user-name {
        font-size: 13px;
        font-weight: 600;
        color: var(--text-primary);
        white-space: nowrap;
        overflow: hidden;
        text-overflow: ellipsis;
      }

      .user-role {
        font-size: 11px;
        color: var(--text-secondary);
      }

      .footer-actions {
        display: flex;
        gap: 8px;
        margin-top: 12px;
        flex-wrap: wrap;
      }

      .footer-btn {
        flex: 1;
        padding: 8px;
        border: 1px solid var(--border-color);
        background: transparent;
        color: var(--text-primary);
        border-radius: 6px;
        cursor: pointer;
        display: flex;
        align-items: center;
        justify-content: center;
        gap: 6px;
        font-size: 12px;
        transition: all 0.2s;
      }

      .footer-btn:hover {
        background: rgba(0, 0, 0, 0.05);
        color: var(--color-primary);
      }

      [data-theme="dark"] .footer-btn:hover {
        background: rgba(255, 255, 255, 0.1);
        color: white;
      }

      .err-msg {
        color: #ff4444;
        font-size: 13px;
        margin-top: 10px;
        display: none;
      }

      /* EMPTY STATE */
      .empty-state {
        display: none;
        /* Hidden by default */
        flex-direction: column;
        align-items: center;
        justify-content: center;
        height: 100%;
        text-align: center;
        padding: 20px;
        color: var(--text-secondary);
        animation: fadeIn 0.3s ease-out;
      }

      .empty-state.show {
        display: flex;
      }

      .empty-icon {
        width: 64px;
        height: 64px;
        color: var(--color-primary);
        margin-bottom: 20px;
        opacity: 0.8;
        background: rgba(37, 99, 235, 0.1);
        padding: 16px;
        border-radius: 50%;
      }

      .empty-title {
        font-size: 24px;
        font-weight: 700;
        color: var(--text-primary);
        margin-bottom: 10px;
      }

      .empty-subtitle {
        font-size: 16px;
        max-width: 400px;
        line-height: 1.5;
      }

      @keyframes fadeIn {
        from {
          opacity: 0;
          transform: translateY(10px);
        }

        to {
          opacity: 1;
          transform: translateY(0);
        }
      }
    </style>
  </head>

  <body>
    <div class="app-container">
      <!-- HEADER 100% -->
      <header class="chat-header">
        <button
          class="toggle-sidebar-btn"
          id="toggleSidebarBtn"
          title="Alternar lista de conversas"
        >
          <i data-lucide="panel-left"></i>
        </button>
        <div class="logo-area">
          <img
            src="https://www.embaplan.com.br/img/logo.png"
            alt="Embaplan"
            class="embaplan-logo"
          />
          <div
            class="header-title"
            style="
              margin-left: 10px;
              border-left: 1px solid var(--border-color);
              padding-left: 15px;
            "
          >
            Assistente de Inteligência Artificial
          </div>
        </div>
        <div class="header-right">
          <div class="connection-status">
            <div class="connection-dot"></div>
            <span>Online</span>
          </div>
          <button
            id="dashboardBtn"
            class="reset-badge-btn"
            title="Dashboard de Performance"
          >
            <i data-lucide="layout-dashboard"></i>
            <span>Dashboard</span>
          </button>
          <button
            id="resetRagBtn"
            class="reset-badge-btn"
            title="Resetar Memória RAG"
          >
            <i data-lucide="database-backup"></i>
            <span>Resetar</span>
          </button>
        </div>
      </header>
      <!-- GRID: Sidebar + Chat -->
      <div class="main-grid">
        <div class="sidebar-backdrop" id="sidebarBackdrop"></div>
        <!-- SIDEBAR -->
        <aside id="sidebar">
          <div id="sessionList">
            <!-- Sessões carregadas aqui -->
          </div>
          <div
            id="dashboardSidebarNote"
            style="
              display: none;
              flex-direction: column;
              gap: 14px;
              padding: 20px;
              overflow-y: auto;
            "
          >
            <div
              style="
                font-size: 14px;
                font-weight: 700;
                display: flex;
                align-items: center;
                gap: 6px;
                color: var(--text-primary);
              "
            >
              <i
                data-lucide="bar-chart-3"
                style="width: 16px; height: 16px"
              ></i>
              <span>Resumo do Painel</span>
            </div>
            <div
              id="dashboardSidebarStats"
              style="display: flex; flex-direction: column; gap: 10px"
            >
              <div style="font-size: 12px; color: var(--text-secondary)">
                Carregando…
              </div>
            </div>
            <p
              style="
                font-size: 11px;
                line-height: 1.5;
                margin: 0;
                color: var(--text-secondary);
                border-top: 1px solid var(--border-color);
                padding-top: 12px;
              "
            >
              As conversas ficam ocultas no modo painel. Feche o painel para
              voltar ao histórico de chats.
            </p>
          </div>
          <!-- SIDEBAR FOOTER -->
          <div class="sidebar-footer">
            <div class="user-profile">
              <div class="user-avatar">AD</div>
              <div class="user-info">
                <div class="user-name">Administrador</div>
                <div class="user-role">Sistema</div>
              </div>
            </div>
            <div class="footer-actions">
              <button
                class="footer-btn"
                id="uploadSheetBtn"
                title="Enviar a planilha do mês para alimentar a linha do tempo"
                style="flex: 1 1 100%"
              >
                <i
                  data-lucide="calendar-plus"
                  style="width: 14px; height: 14px"
                ></i>
                <span>Planilha do Mês</span>
              </button>
              <input
                type="file"
                id="sheetFileInput"
                accept=".xlsx,.xls,.csv,application/vnd.openxmlformats-officedocument.spreadsheetml.sheet,application/vnd.ms-excel,text/csv"
                style="display: none"
              />
              <button
                class="footer-btn"
                id="themeToggleBtn"
                title="Alternar Tema"
              >
                <i data-lucide="moon" style="width: 14px; height: 14px"></i>
                <span>Tema</span>
              </button>
              <button class="footer-btn" id="logoutBtn" title="Sair do sistema">
                <i data-lucide="log-out" style="width: 14px; height: 14px"></i>
                <span>Sair</span>
              </button>
            </div>
          </div>
        </aside>
        <!-- CHAT AREA -->
        <main id="chatArea">
          <div id="messagesContainer"></div>

          <!-- Empty State -->
          <div id="emptyState" class="empty-state">
            <div class="empty-icon">
              <i
                data-lucide="message-square-dashed"
                style="width: 100%; height: 100%"
              ></i>
            </div>
            <div class="empty-title">Como posso ajudar?</div>
            <div class="empty-subtitle">

            localStorage.removeItem(testKey);
            this.isAvailable = true;
          } catch (e) {
            this.isAvailable = false;
            console.warn(

            );
          }
        },
        get: function (key) {
          if (this.isAvailable) {
            try {
              return localStorage.getItem(key);
            } catch (e) {
              // Should not happen if init was correct, but safety first
              return this._memory[key] || null;
            }
          }
          return this._memory[key] || null;
        },
        set: function (key, value) {
          if (this.isAvailable) {
            try {
              localStorage.setItem(key, value);
            } catch (e) {}
          }
          this._memory[key] = value;

      const AUTH_KEY = "chat_auth_v2";
      const AUTH_EXPIRY_MS = 12 * 60 * 60 * 1000; // 12 Hours

      function checkAuth() {
        // AUTO-LOGIN FOR SANDBOX (Dev/Restricted Environment)
        // If storage is completely blocked, we can't persist auth, so we auto-login to avoid infinite login loops on reload.
        if (!storage.isAvailable) {
          console.warn(
            "⚠️ Sandbox mode detected: Persistence disabled. Auto-logging in for convenience.",
          );
          toggleLoginState(true);
          startApp();
          return;
        }

        try {
          const rawAuth = storage.get(AUTH_KEY);
          if (!rawAuth) {
            toggleLoginState(false);
            return;
          }

          const authData = JSON.parse(rawAuth);
          const now = Date.now();

          // Check if expired
          if (now > authData.expiry) {
            console.log("🔒 Session expired");
            storage.remove(AUTH_KEY);
            toggleLoginState(false);
          } else {
            console.log(
              "🔓 Session valid until:",
              new Date(authData.expiry).toLocaleString(),
            );
            toggleLoginState(true);
            startApp(); // ONLY START APP IF AUTH IS VALID
          }
        } catch (e) {
          console.error("Auth verification failed:", e);
          // On error, force logout to be safe
          storage.remove(AUTH_KEY);
          toggleLoginState(false);
        }
      }

      let healthCheckInterval = null;

      function setOfflineState(isOffline) {
        const statusContainer = document.querySelector(".connection-status");
        const dot = document.querySelector(".connection-dot");
        const text = statusContainer.querySelector("span");

        if (!statusContainer || !dot || !text) return;

        if (isOffline) {
          text.textContent = "Offline";
          statusContainer.style.color = "#f44336";
          statusContainer.style.background = "rgba(244, 67, 54, 0.1)";
          statusContainer.style.borderColor = "rgba(244, 67, 54, 0.2)";
          dot.style.background = "#f44336";
          dot.style.boxShadow = "0 0 5px #f44336";
          dot.style.animation = "none";

          // Inicia o polling apenas se entrar em estado offline e já não estiver testando
          if (!healthCheckInterval) {
            healthCheckInterval = setInterval(checkHealth, 10000); // 10 segundos
          }
        } else {
          text.textContent = "Online";
          statusContainer.style.color = "#4CAF50";
          statusContainer.style.background = "rgba(76, 175, 80, 0.1)";
          statusContainer.style.borderColor = "rgba(76, 175, 80, 0.2)";
          dot.style.background = "#4CAF50";
          dot.style.boxShadow = "0 0 5px #4CAF50";
          dot.style.animation = "pulse 2s infinite";

          // Se voltar a ficar online, desliga o polling automático
          if (healthCheckInterval) {
            clearInterval(healthCheckInterval);
            healthCheckInterval = null;
          }
        }
      }

      async function checkHealth() {
        try {
          const response = await fetch(HEALTH_URL, { cache: "no-store" });
          if (!response.ok) {
            setOfflineState(true);
            return;
          }
          const data = await response.json();
          if (data && data.status === "ok") {
            setOfflineState(false);
          } else {
            setOfflineState(true);
          }
        } catch (error) {
          setOfflineState(true);
        }
      }

      // Interceptador global do fetch para monitorar erros de API sem precisar de polling constante
      const originalFetch = window.fetch;
      window.fetch = async function (...args) {
        let url = "";
        if (typeof args[0] === "string") {
          url = args[0];
        } else if (args[0] && args[0].url) {
          url = args[0].url;
        }

        try {
          const response = await originalFetch(...args);
          // Não intercepta os health checks para não causar loop
          if (url.startsWith(API_BASE) && !url.includes("embaplan_health")) {
            if (response.ok) {
              setOfflineState(false);
            } else if (response.status >= 500) {
              // Respostas 500+ costumam significar que o backend caiu
              setOfflineState(true);
            }
          }
          return response;
        } catch (error) {
          if (url.startsWith(API_BASE) && !url.includes("embaplan_health")) {
            if (error.name !== "AbortError") {
              setOfflineState(true);
            }
          }
          throw error;
        }
      };

      async function fetchHistory(sessionId) {
        try {
          console.log("📜 Fetching history for session:", sessionId);
          const response = await fetch(`${HISTORY_URL}?sessionId=${sessionId}`);
          if (!response.ok) throw new Error("Failed to fetch history");

          const text = await response.text();
          // Handle empty response
          if (!text || text.trim().length === 0) {
            return [];
          }

          let data;
          try {
            data = JSON.parse(text);
          } catch (e) {
            console.error("❌ Failed to parse history JSON:", text);
            return [];
          }

          console.log("✅ History loaded:", data);

          // Processar dados que podem vir em diferentes formatos
          return data.map((item) => {
            let processedItem = item;

            // Se vier no formato JSONB {message: {type, content}}
            if (item.message) {
              processedItem = {
                id: item.id, // Preserve ID from DB
                role: item.message.type === "human" ? "user" : "assistant",
                content: item.message.content || "",
                timestamp:
                  item.created_at || item.message.timestamp || item.timestamp,
              };
            }

            // DETECT FILE UPLOAD PATTERN to restore File Icon
            // Pattern: "Enviando arquivo: filename.ext"
            const legacyMatch =
              processedItem.content &&
              processedItem.content.match(/^Enviando arquivo: (.+)$/);
            const newMatch =
              processedItem.content &&
              processedItem.content.match(
                /^Arquivo (.+) enviado para análise\.$/,
              );

            if ((legacyMatch || newMatch) && processedItem.role === "user") {
              processedItem.file = newMatch ? newMatch[1] : legacyMatch[1];
              // Optional: Keep content as is or clear it if you only want the icon
            }

            return processedItem;
          });
        } catch (error) {
          console.error("Error fetching history:", error);
          return [];
        }
      }

      // Polls history endpoint until a new assistant message appears OR timeout.
      // Used as recovery when the chat HTTP request is dropped by a proxy (e.g. CF 524 / 100s timeout)
      // but the n8n workflow keeps running and eventually persists the answer in Postgres.
      async function pollHistoryForRecovery(sessionId, baselineMaxId, onChunk) {
        const MAX_MS = 5 * 60 * 1000; // 5 min ceiling
        const INTERVAL_MS = 5000;
        const start = Date.now();
        if (onChunk) {
          onChunk(
            "_⏳ A conexão caiu, mas o agente continua trabalhando em background. Aguardando a resposta ser gravada no histórico..._",
          );
        }
        while (Date.now() - start < MAX_MS) {
          if (abortController && abortController.signal.aborted) return null;
          await new Promise((r) => setTimeout(r, INTERVAL_MS));
          if (abortController && abortController.signal.aborted) return null;
          try {
            const hist = await fetchHistory(sessionId);
            if (!hist || !hist.length) continue;
            // Look for an assistant message strictly newer than the baseline snapshot taken before sending.
            const newerAssistant = hist.filter(
              (m) =>
                (Number(m.id) || 0) > baselineMaxId && m.role === "assistant",
            );
            if (newerAssistant.length) {
              const last = newerAssistant[newerAssistant.length - 1];
              if (onChunk && last.content) onChunk(last.content);
              return last.content || "";
            }
          } catch (e) {
            console.warn("Recovery poll failed:", e);
          }
        }
        return null;
      }

      async function sendMessage(message, sessionId, onChunk) {
        abortController = new AbortController();

        // Snapshot of the most recent message ID BEFORE sending.
        // Anything with an id greater than this and role=assistant after the call is our recovered response.
        let baselineMaxId = 0;
        try {
          const baseline = await fetchHistory(sessionId);
          if (baseline && baseline.length) {
            baselineMaxId = baseline.reduce(
              (max, m) => Math.max(max, Number(m.id) || 0),
              0,
            );
          }
        } catch (e) {
          console.warn("Baseline history snapshot failed:", e);
        }

        try {
          const response = await fetch(CHAT_URL, {
            method: "POST",
            headers: { "Content-Type": "application/json" },
            body: JSON.stringify({
              chatInput: message,
              sessionId: sessionId,
              stream: true, // Flag opcional, caso o backend n8n exija
            }),
            signal: abortController.signal,
          });

          if (!response.ok) {
            // Proxy/gateway timeout (524, 502, 504, etc.) — n8n likely still running. Try recovery.
            if ([502, 503, 504, 520, 521, 522, 524].includes(response.status)) {
              console.warn(
                `Gateway error ${response.status} — starting history-poll recovery`,
              );
              const recovered = await pollHistoryForRecovery(
                sessionId,
                baselineMaxId,
                onChunk,
              );
              if (recovered) return recovered;
            }
            throw new Error("Failed to send message");
          }

          // Verifica se suporta streaming (não é JSON direto)
          const contentType = response.headers.get("content-type");
          if (contentType && contentType.includes("application/json")) {
            const data = await response.json();
            return data.output || data.message || "Resposta recebida";
          }

          // Streaming Reader
          const reader = response.body.getReader();
          const decoder = new TextDecoder();
          let fullText = "";

          while (true) {
            const { done, value } = await reader.read();
            if (done) break;

            const chunk = decoder.decode(value, { stream: true });

            // Decodificar chunks (SSE ou texto puro)
            const lines = chunk.split("\n");
            for (const line of lines) {
              if (line.startsWith("data: ")) {
                if (line.trim() === "data: [DONE]") continue;
                try {
                  const data = JSON.parse(line.slice(6));
                  if (data.output || data.message)
                    fullText += data.output || data.message;
                  else if (data.text) fullText += data.text;
                } catch (e) {
                  // Caso o conteúdo do 'data:' não seja um JSON, assume como texto puro
                  fullText += line.slice(6).replace(/\\n/g, "\n");
                }
              } else if (line.trim() !== "") {
                // Considera como string pura se não começar por metadados de SSE
                if (
                  !line.startsWith("event: ") &&
                  !line.startsWith("id: ") &&
                  !line.startsWith("retry: ")
                ) {
                  fullText += line.replace(/\\n/g, "\n");
                }
              }
            }
            if (onChunk) onChunk(fullText);
          }

          return fullText || "Resposta recebida";
        } catch (error) {
          if (error.name === "AbortError") {
            console.log("⏹️ Geração cancelada pelo usuário");
            return "Geração cancelada.";
          }
          console.error("Error sending message:", error);
          // Network/connection drop (proxy timeout, socket closed mid-stream, etc.)
          // n8n usually keeps processing — try recovering the answer from history.
          const recovered = await pollHistoryForRecovery(
            sessionId,
            baselineMaxId,
            onChunk,
          );
          if (recovered) return recovered;
          return "Desculpe, ocorreu um erro ao processar sua mensagem.";
        } finally {
          abortController = null;
        }
      }

      function formatDate(dateString) {
        const date = new Date(dateString);
        const now = new Date();
        const diffInHours = (now - date) / (1000 * 60 * 60);
        if (diffInHours < 24) {
          return date.toLocaleTimeString("pt-BR", {
            hour: "2-digit",
            minute: "2-digit",
          });
        } else if (diffInHours < 48) {
          return "Ontem";
        } else {
          return date.toLocaleDateString("pt-BR", {
            day: "2-digit",
            month: "2-digit",
          });
        }
      }

      async function pruneHistoryFrom(identifier) {
        // Identifier can be ID (int) or timestamp (long int)
        const type = elements.inputForm.dataset.editingType || "timestamp";
        const value = parseInt(identifier);
        if (!value) return;

        let targetMsg;
        if (type === "id") {
          targetMsg = Array.from(elements.messagesContainer.children).find(
            (m) => m.getAttribute("data-id") == value,
          );
        } else {
          targetMsg = Array.from(elements.messagesContainer.children).find(
            (m) => m.getAttribute("data-timestamp") == value,
          );
        }

        // 1. UI Pruning
        if (targetMsg) {
          let current = targetMsg;
          while (current) {
            const next = current.nextElementSibling;
            current.remove();
            current = next;
          }
        }

        // 2. Backend Pruning
        if (currentSessionId && type === "id") {
          console.log(
            `🧹 Pruning backend history (ID):`,
            currentSessionId,
            value,
          );
          try {
            const payload = {
              sessionId: currentSessionId,
              id: value,
            };

            await fetch(PRUNE_URL, {
              method: "POST",
              body: JSON.stringify(payload),
              headers: { "Content-Type": "application/json" },
            });
          } catch (e) {
            console.error("Prune error:", e);
          }
        } else if (type !== "id") {
          console.warn(
            "⚠️ Cannot prune backend history without Message ID (Optimistic message). Reload to sync IDs.",
          );
        }
      }

      // ======= HELPER: wrap inner campaign sub-sections in styled boxes =======
      function componentizeCampaignBody(cBody) {
        let out = cBody;
        // Terminator: next sub-section emoji (handles * ** bullet prefix), HTML blocks, or end
        var subEnd =
          "(?=\\n\\s*(?:\\*\\s+)?\\*{0,2}\\s*(?:💡|🔍|🛠️)|\\n<div[\\s>]|\\n<details[\\s>]|$)";

        // 💡 Análise Tática → tactic-box  (handles: * **💡 Title (Extra):** , ## 💡 Title:, 💡 Title)
        out = out.replace(
          new RegExp(
            "(?:^|\\n)\\s*(?:\\*\\s+)?\\*{0,2}\\s*(?:#{1,3}\\s*)?💡[^\\n]*\\n([\\s\\S]*?)" +
              subEnd,
            "gi",
          ),
          function (m, body) {
            return (
              '\n\n<div class="tactic-box"><div class="tactic-box-header">💡 Análise Tática</div>\n\n' +
              body.trim() +
              "\n\n</div>\n\n"
            );
          },
        );

        // 🔍 Auditoria do Link → audit-box
        out = out.replace(
          new RegExp(
            "(?:^|\\n)\\s*(?:\\*\\s+)?\\*{0,2}\\s*(?:#{1,3}\\s*)?🔍[^\\n]*\\n([\\s\\S]*?)" +
              subEnd,
            "gi",
          ),
          function (m, body) {
            return (
              '\n\n<div class="audit-box"><div class="audit-box-header">🔍 Auditoria do Link</div>\n\n' +
              body.trim() +
              "\n\n</div>\n\n"
            );
          },
        );

        // 🛠️ Ação Corretiva → action-box
        out = out.replace(
          new RegExp(
            "(?:^|\\n)\\s*(?:\\*\\s+)?\\*{0,2}\\s*(?:#{1,3}\\s*)?🛠️[^\\n]*\\n([\\s\\S]*?)" +
              subEnd,
            "gi",
          ),
          function (m, body) {
            var enhanced = body.trim();
            enhanced = enhanced.replace(
              /\[URGENTE\]/gi,
              '<span class="priority-badge urgente">URGENTE</span>',
            );
            enhanced = enhanced.replace(
              /\[ALTA\]/gi,
              '<span class="priority-badge alta">ALTA</span>',
            );
            enhanced = enhanced.replace(
              /\[M[EÉ]DIA\]/gi,
              '<span class="priority-badge media">MÉDIA</span>',
            );
            enhanced = enhanced.replace(
              /\[BAIXA\]/gi,
              '<span class="priority-badge baixa">BAIXA</span>',
            );
            enhanced = enhanced.replace(
              /\[TESTE\]/gi,
              '<span class="priority-badge teste">TESTE</span>',
            );
            return (
              '\n\n<div class="action-box"><div class="action-box-header">🛠️ Ação Corretiva</div>\n\n' +
              enhanced +
              "\n\n</div>\n\n"
            );
          },
        );

        return out;
      }

      // ======= HELPER: wrap product-level sections in styled boxes =======
      // Runs AFTER campaigns are already extracted (replaced with <div class="campaign-card">)
      function componentizeProductSections(innerBody) {
        let out = innerBody;
        // Terminator: next section emoji (with/without # prefix), HTML blocks, or end
        var secEnd =
          "(?=\\n\\s*(?:#{1,3}\\s+|\\*{0,2}\\s*(?:📋|🎯|🔑|⚔️|📚|📢))|\\n<div[\\s>]|\\n<span[\\s>]|\\n<details[\\s>]|$)";

        // 📋 Visão Executiva → section-box vision (handles with/without # prefix)
        out = out.replace(
          new RegExp(
            "(?:^|\\n)\\s*(?:#{1,3}\\s*)?\\*{0,2}\\s*📋[^\\n]*\\n([\\s\\S]*?)" +
              secEnd,
            "gi",
          ),
          function (m, body) {
            return (
              '\n\n<div class="section-box vision"><div class="section-box-header"><span class="section-icon">📋</span> Visão Executiva</div>\n\n' +
              body.trim() +
              "\n\n</div>\n\n"
            );
          },
        );

        // 🎯 ESTRATÉGIA → section-box strategy
        out = out.replace(
          new RegExp(
            "(?:^|\\n)\\s*(?:#{1,3}\\s*)?\\*{0,2}\\s*🎯[^\\n]*\\n([\\s\\S]*?)" +
              secEnd,
            "gi",
          ),
          function (m, body) {
            return (
              '\n\n<div class="section-box strategy"><div class="section-box-header"><span class="section-icon">🎯</span> Estratégia</div>\n\n' +
              body.trim() +
              "\n\n</div>\n\n"
            );
          },
        );

        // 🔑 INTELIGÊNCIA GLOBAL → section-box keywords
        out = out.replace(
          new RegExp(
            "(?:^|\\n)\\s*(?:#{1,3}\\s*)?\\*{0,2}\\s*🔑[^\\n]*\\n([\\s\\S]*?)" +
              secEnd,
            "gi",
          ),
          function (m, body) {
            return (
              '\n\n<div class="section-box keywords"><div class="section-box-header"><span class="section-icon">🔑</span> Inteligência Global de Palavras-chave</div>\n\n' +
              body.trim() +
              "\n\n</div>\n\n"
            );
          },
        );

        // Cálculo consolidado → collapsible calc block
        out = out.replace(
          new RegExp(
            "(?:^|\\n)\\s*(?:#{1,3}\\s*)?\\*{0,2}\\s*(?:Cálculo consolidado|Calculo consolidado)[^\\n]*\\n([\\s\\S]*?)" +
              secEnd,
            "gi",
          ),
          function (m, body) {
            return (
              '\n\n<details class="calc-collapsible"><summary>📐 Cálculo Consolidado</summary><div class="calc-body">\n\n' +
              body.trim() +
              "\n\n</div></details>\n\n"
            );
          },
        );

        return out;
      }

      // ======= Parse assistant content into componentized HTML =======
      // KEY DESIGN: marked.parse() is called on inner content pieces BEFORE
      // wrapping in <details>/<summary>, so marked never breaks the accordion structure.
      function parseAssistantHTML(rawText) {
        let parsedContent = rawText || "";

        // Clean visual separators early (before any regex processing)
        parsedContent = parsedContent.replace(/\n={3,}\n/g, "\n\n");
        parsedContent = parsedContent.replace(/\n-{3,}\n/g, "\n\n");
        parsedContent = parsedContent.replace(
          /--+\s*ANALISANDO\s+CAMPANHAS[^\n]*--*/gi,
          "",
        );

        // Strip markdown heading prefixes and numbered list prefixes (e.g. "## 1) ", "**2.**", "3) ") from product/pending lines so regexes match
        parsedContent = parsedContent.replace(
          /^[ \t]*(?:#{1,3}\s*)?(?:\*\*|__)?\s*\d+\s*[.)\-:]\s*(?:\*\*|__)?\s*(📦\s)/gm,
          "$1",
        );
        parsedContent = parsedContent.replace(
          /^[ \t]*(#{1,3})\s+(📦\s)/gm,
          "$2",
        );
        parsedContent = parsedContent.replace(
          /^[ \t]*(#{1,3})\s+(⏳\s)/gm,
          "$2",
        );

        if (
          parsedContent.includes("📦") &&
          parsedContent.includes("PRODUTO:")
        ) {
          // Extract intro text BEFORE the first 📦 PRODUTO block
          const firstProductIdx = parsedContent.search(
            /📦\s*(?:\*\*|)\s*PRODUTO:/,
          );
          let introHtml = "";
          if (firstProductIdx > 0) {
            let introText = parsedContent.substring(0, firstProductIdx).trim();
            parsedContent = parsedContent.substring(firstProductIdx);
            // Strip stray numbered product headers from intro (e.g. "# 1) BASE A4")
            introText = introText
              .replace(
                /(^|\n)[ \t]*(?:#{1,6}[ \t]+|\*\*[ \t]*)\d+\)[ \t]+[^\n]{1,80}?(?:[ \t]*\*\*)?[ \t]*(?=\n|$)/g,
                "$1",
              )
              .replace(/\n{3,}/g, "\n\n")
              .trim();
            if (introText.length > 10) {
              introHtml =
                '<div class="intro-box">' + marked.parse(introText) + "</div>";
            }
          }

          // Extract PENDING INDEXES section at the end
          let pendingHtml = "";
          const pendingMatch = parsedContent.match(
            /\n(#{1,3}\s*)?⏳\s*(?:\*\*)?(?:INDEXES? PENDENTES?|Indexes? Pendentes?)[^\n]*\n([\s\S]*)$/i,
          );
          if (pendingMatch) {
            const pendingAll = pendingMatch[0];
            parsedContent = parsedContent.substring(
              0,
              parsedContent.length - pendingAll.length,
            );
            const pendingBody = pendingAll
              .replace(
                /^[\s\n]*(#{1,3}\s*)?⏳\s*(?:\*\*)?(?:INDEXES? PENDENTES?|Indexes? Pendentes?)[^\n]*\n?/i,
                "",
              )
              .trim();
            pendingHtml =
              '<div class="pending-cta"><div class="pending-cta-header"><span class="pending-icon">⏳</span> Indexes Pendentes de Análise</div>' +
              marked.parse(pendingBody) +
              "</div>";
          }

          // Strip stray numbered product headers the agent sometimes emits
          // (e.g. "# 1) BASE A4", "## 2) QC 5", "**3) QC 10**", "1) PRODUTO X")
          // These are never part of the template — only 📦 PRODUTO: is valid.
          // Match markdown headers OR bold-only lines that look like "N) NAME".
          parsedContent = parsedContent.replace(
            /(^|\n)[ \t]*(?:#{1,6}[ \t]+|\*\*[ \t]*)\d+\)[ \t]+[^\n]{1,80}?(?:[ \t]*\*\*)?[ \t]*(?=\n|$)/g,
            "$1",
          );

          // Process product blocks — collect HTML into array
          const productRegex =
            /(?:^|\n)(📦\s*(?:\*\*|)\s*PRODUTO:[^\n]+)([\s\S]*?)(?=\n\s*(?:#{1,6}\s*)?(?:\*\*\s*)?\d+\)\s*[^\n]+\n+\s*📦\s*(?:\*\*|)\s*PRODUTO:|\n📦\s*(?:\*\*|)\s*PRODUTO:|\n(?:#{1,3}\s*)?⏳\s*(?:\*\*|)\s*INDEXES? PENDENTES?|$)/gi;

          let productIndex = 0;
          const totalProducts = (
            parsedContent.match(/📦\s*(?:\*\*|)\s*PRODUTO:/gi) || []
          ).length;
          const productHtmlBlocks = [];

          // Use exec loop to process each product
          let pMatch;
          while ((pMatch = productRegex.exec(parsedContent)) !== null) {
            productIndex++;
            const titleLine = pMatch[1];
            const body = pMatch[2];
            const title = titleLine.replace(/\*\*/g, "").trim();
            let innerBody = body.trim();

            // Health score
            innerBody = innerBody.replace(
              /🏥\s*(?:\*\*)?Saúde do Produto(?:\*\*)?\s*[:：]\s*([\d.,]+)\s*\/\s*10\s*[-–]?\s*([^\n]*)/gi,
              function (m, score, desc) {
                const numScore = parseFloat(score.replace(",", "."));
                const tier =
                  numScore >= 7 ? "high" : numScore >= 4 ? "medium" : "low";
                return `\n\n<div class="product-health"><div class="health-score-circle score-${tier}">${score}</div><div class="health-info"><div class="health-label">Saúde do Produto</div><div class="health-desc">${desc.trim() || (tier === "high" ? "Linha saudável" : tier === "medium" ? "Atenção necessária" : "Linha crítica")}</div></div></div>\n\n`;
              },
            );

            // Consolidated KPIs
            innerBody = innerBody.replace(
              /📊\s*(?:\*\*)?Consolidado(?:\s*da\s*Linha)?(?:\*\*)?\s*[:：]\s*([^\n]+)/gi,
              function (m, kpis) {
                const parts = kpis.split("|").map((p) => p.trim());
                let html = '<div class="product-summary-grid">';
                parts.forEach((p) => {
                  const [label, ...rest] = p.split(":");
                  const val = rest.join(":").trim();
                  if (label && val) {
                    html += `<div class="summary-card"><div class="summary-value">${val}</div><div class="summary-label">${label.trim()}</div></div>`;
                  }
                });
                html += "</div>";
                return "\n\n" + html + "\n\n";
              },
            );

            // RAG sources
            innerBody = innerBody.replace(
              /📚\s*(?:\*\*)?Fonte(?:s)?\s*RAG(?:\*\*)?\s*[:：]\s*([^\n]+)/gi,
              function (m, sources) {
                const srcs = sources
                  .split(",")
                  .map((s) => s.trim())
                  .filter(Boolean);
                return (
                  "\n\n" +
                  srcs
                    .map((s) => `<span class="rag-source">📚 ${s}</span>`)
                    .join(" ") +
                  "\n\n"
                );
              },
            );

            // Cannibalization warnings (multi-line: captures paragraph until blank-line break)
            innerBody = innerBody.replace(
              /⚔️\s*(?:\*\*)?Canibalização(?:\*\*)?\s*[:：]\s*([^\n]+(?:\n(?!\n)[^\n]*)*)/gi,
              function (m, text) {
                return `\n\n<div class="cannibalization-warning"><strong>⚔️ Atenção:</strong> ${text.trim()}</div>\n\n`;
              },
            );

            // *** CAMPAIGNS FIRST — extract before section componentization ***
            if (innerBody.includes("📢") && innerBody.includes("CAMPANHA:")) {
              const campRegex =
                /(?:^|\n)(📢\s*(?:\*\*|)\s*CAMPANHA:[^\n]+)([\s\S]*?)(?=\n📢\s*(?:\*\*|)\s*CAMPANHA:|\n\s*(?:#{1,3}\s*)?(?:📋|🎯|🔑)|$)/gi;
              let campRank = 0;
              innerBody = innerBody.replace(
                campRegex,
                function (cMatch, cTitleLine, cBody) {
                  campRank++;
                  const cleanTitle = cTitleLine.replace(/\*\*/g, "").trim();

                  // Extract the unique ad index (e.g. "L2#47" or "39") to key the history timeline
                  let adIndex = "";
                  const idxMatch = cleanTitle.match(/Index\s*#\s*([^\s—–|]+)/i);
                  if (idxMatch) adIndex = idxMatch[1].replace(/[.,;:]+$/, "");

                  let statusClass = "";
                  const statusContext =
                    cleanTitle + " " + cBody.substring(0, 500);
                  if (
                    statusContext.includes("🚀") ||
                    /escalável|escalavel/i.test(statusContext)
                  )
                    statusClass = "escalavel";
                  else if (/⏳|maturação|maturacao/i.test(statusContext))
                    statusClass = "maturacao";
                  else if (/⚠️|gargalo/i.test(statusContext))
                    statusClass = "gargalo";
                  else if (/🛑|ralo/i.test(statusContext)) statusClass = "ralo";

                  const rankClass = campRank <= 3 ? ` rank-${campRank}` : "";
                  const statusLabel =
                    statusClass === "escalavel"
                      ? "🚀 Escalável"
                      : statusClass === "maturacao"
                        ? "⏳ Maturação"
                        : statusClass === "gargalo"
                          ? "⚠️ Gargalo"
                          : statusClass === "ralo"
                            ? "🛑 Ralo"
                            : "";

                  let campBody = componentizeCampaignBody(cBody.trim());
                  campBody = campBody.replace(
                    /\[URGENTE\]/gi,
                    '<span class="priority-badge urgente">URGENTE</span>',
                  );
                  campBody = campBody.replace(
                    /\[ALTA\]/gi,
                    '<span class="priority-badge alta">ALTA</span>',
                  );
                  campBody = campBody.replace(
                    /\[M[EÉ]DIA\]/gi,
                    '<span class="priority-badge media">MÉDIA</span>',
                  );
                  campBody = campBody.replace(
                    /\[BAIXA\]/gi,
                    '<span class="priority-badge baixa">BAIXA</span>',
                  );
                  campBody = campBody.replace(
                    /\[TESTE\]/gi,
                    '<span class="priority-badge teste">TESTE</span>',
                  );

                  return `\n\n<div class="campaign-card" data-status="${statusClass}">\n<h4><span class="rank-badge${rankClass}">${campRank}</span> ${cleanTitle} ${statusLabel ? `<span class="status-badge ${statusClass}">${statusLabel}</span>` : ""}${adIndex ? ` <button type="button" class="history-btn" data-index="${adIndex}" title="Ver linha do tempo deste anúncio">📈 Histórico</button>` : ""}</h4>\n\n${campBody}\n\n</div>\n\n`;
                },
              );
            }

            // *** THEN product-level sections (now safe — campaigns already replaced with <div>) ***
            innerBody = componentizeProductSections(innerBody);

            // Apply priority tags to any remaining text in innerBody
            innerBody = innerBody.replace(
              /\[URGENTE\]/gi,
              '<span class="priority-badge urgente">URGENTE</span>',
            );
            innerBody = innerBody.replace(
              /\[ALTA\]/gi,
              '<span class="priority-badge alta">ALTA</span>',
            );
            innerBody = innerBody.replace(
              /\[M[EÉ]DIA\]/gi,
              '<span class="priority-badge media">MÉDIA</span>',
            );
            innerBody = innerBody.replace(
              /\[BAIXA\]/gi,
              '<span class="priority-badge baixa">BAIXA</span>',
            );
            innerBody = innerBody.replace(
              /\[TESTE\]/gi,
              '<span class="priority-badge teste">TESTE</span>',
            );

            // Parse inner content with marked BEFORE wrapping in <details>
            // This ensures marked.parse() never sees <details>/<summary> tags
            const innerHtml = marked.parse(innerBody);

            const isOpen = productIndex === 1 ? " open" : "";
            productHtmlBlocks.push(
              '<details class="campaign-accordion product-block" data-product="' +
                productIndex +
                '"' +
                isOpen +
                ">" +
                '<summary><span class="product-number">' +
                productIndex +
                "/" +
                totalProducts +
                "</span> " +
                title +
                "</summary>" +
                '<div class="product-body">' +
                innerHtml +
                "</div>" +
                "</details>",
            );
          }

          // Build expand/collapse all toggle if multiple products
          let toggleHtml = "";
          if (totalProducts > 1) {
            toggleHtml =
              '<div class="products-toggle-bar"><span class="products-count">' +
              totalProducts +
              " produtos analisados</span><button class=\"toggle-all-btn\" onclick=\"(function(btn){var blocks=btn.closest('.message-content').querySelectorAll('.product-block');var anyOpen=Array.from(blocks).some(function(b){return b.open});blocks.forEach(function(b){b.open=!anyOpen});btn.textContent=anyOpen?'Expandir todos':'Recolher todos'})(this)\">Recolher todos</button></div>";
          }

          // Concatenate final HTML — <details> tags are pure HTML, never passed through marked
          return emojiToSvg(
            introHtml + toggleHtml + productHtmlBlocks.join("") + pendingHtml,
          );
        }

        // Non-product content: priority tags then marked
        parsedContent = parsedContent.replace(
          /\[URGENTE\]/gi,
          '<span class="priority-badge urgente">URGENTE</span>',
        );
        parsedContent = parsedContent.replace(
          /\[ALTA\]/gi,
          '<span class="priority-badge alta">ALTA</span>',
        );
        parsedContent = parsedContent.replace(
          /\[M[EÉ]DIA\]/gi,
          '<span class="priority-badge media">MÉDIA</span>',
        );
        parsedContent = parsedContent.replace(
          /\[BAIXA\]/gi,
          '<span class="priority-badge baixa">BAIXA</span>',
        );
        parsedContent = parsedContent.replace(
          /\[TESTE\]/gi,
          '<span class="priority-badge teste">TESTE</span>',
        );

        return emojiToSvg(marked.parse(parsedContent));
      }

      function renderMessage(message) {
        hideEmptyState(); // Ensure empty state is gone
        console.log("🖼️ Rendering message:", message);
        const messageDiv = document.createElement("div");
        messageDiv.className = `message ${message.role}`;
        if (message.id) messageDiv.setAttribute("data-id", message.id);

        // Store timestamp for Edit logic (default to now if missing)
        const timestamp = message.timestamp
          ? new Date(message.timestamp).getTime()
          : Date.now();
        messageDiv.setAttribute("data-timestamp", timestamp);

        const avatarDiv = document.createElement("div");
        avatarDiv.className = "message-avatar";

        if (message.role === "user") {
          avatarDiv.innerHTML = '<i data-lucide="user"></i>';
        } else {
          avatarDiv.innerHTML = '<i data-lucide="bot"></i>';
        }

        const content = document.createElement("div");
        content.className = "message-content";

        // Renderizar conteúdo
        let editBtn = null;

        if (message.role === "assistant") {
          content.innerHTML = parseAssistantHTML(message.content);

          // Force new tab for links
          content.querySelectorAll("a").forEach((link) => {
            link.setAttribute("target", "_blank");
            link.setAttribute("rel", "noopener noreferrer");
          });
        } else {
          // Se for arquivo, NÃO mostra texto nem botão de editar
          if (message.file) {
            // Conteúdo de texto oculto para arquivos, mostra só o pill abaixo
          } else {
            content.textContent = message.content || "";

            // ADD EDIT BUTTON FOR USER (Always allow edit)
            editBtn = document.createElement("button");
            editBtn.className = "btn-edit";
            editBtn.innerHTML =
              '<i data-lucide="pencil" style="width: 14px; height: 14px;"></i>';
            editBtn.onclick = () => {
              startEdit(messageDiv, message.content);
            };
          }
        }

        // Add file attachment if present
        if (message.file) {
          const fileDiv = document.createElement("div");
          fileDiv.className = "file-attachment";
          fileDiv.innerHTML = `<i data-lucide="file"></i><span>${message.file}</span>`;
          content.appendChild(fileDiv);
        }

        if (message.role === "assistant") {
          // Avatar first for assistant
          messageDiv.appendChild(avatarDiv);
          messageDiv.appendChild(content);
        } else {
          // User: Avatar last (handled by flex-row-reverse), content first
          // Fix for flex-row-reverse:
          // 1. Avatar (Visually Right) -> Append First
          // 2. Content (Visually Center) -> Append Second
          // 3. EditBtn (Visually Left) -> Append Last
          messageDiv.appendChild(avatarDiv);
          messageDiv.appendChild(content);
          if (editBtn) {
            messageDiv.appendChild(editBtn);
          }
        }

        elements.messagesContainer.appendChild(messageDiv);
        elements.messagesContainer.scrollTop =
          elements.messagesContainer.scrollHeight;
        lucide.createIcons();

        return messageDiv;
      }

      function setLoading(loading) {
        isLoading = loading;
        const sendBtnIcon = elements.sendBtn.querySelector("i");

        // Toggle Stop Button Logic
        if (loading) {
          elements.sendBtn.innerHTML = "";
          const stopIcon = document.createElement("i");
          stopIcon.setAttribute("data-lucide", "square");
          stopIcon.style.fill = "white";
          elements.sendBtn.appendChild(stopIcon);
          elements.sendBtn.style.backgroundColor = "var(--text-secondary)";
          elements.sendBtn.title = "Parar Geração";
        } else {
          elements.sendBtn.innerHTML = '<i data-lucide="send"></i>';
          elements.sendBtn.style.backgroundColor = "";
          elements.sendBtn.title = "Enviar";
        }
        lucide.createIcons();

        // Visual loading state on container
        elements.loading.classList.toggle("show", loading);

        // Disable Interactive Elements (EXCEPT sendBtn which is now Stop)
        const interactiveElements = [
          elements.messageInput,
          elements.resetRagBtn,
          elements.themeToggleBtn,
          elements.logoutBtn,
          elements.attachBtn,
          elements.fileInput,
          elements.newChatBtn,
        ];

        interactiveElements.forEach((el) => {
          if (el) el.disabled = loading;
        });

        // Specific Feedback for Reset Button if that's the action
        if (pendingAction === "resetProcessing") {
          if (loading && elements.resetRagBtn) {
            elements.resetRagBtn.innerHTML = `<i data-lucide="loader-2" class="animate-spin" style="width:12px; height:12px;"></i><span>Resetando...</span>`;
          } else if (!loading && elements.resetRagBtn) {
            elements.resetRagBtn.innerHTML = `<i data-lucide="database-backup" style="width:12px; height:12px;"></i><span>Resetar</span>`;
            pendingAction = null;
          }
          lucide.createIcons();
        }

        // Cursor feedback
        document.body.style.cursor = loading ? "wait" : "default";
      }

      function setStatus(message, type = "") {
        elements.statusMessage.textContent = message;
        elements.statusMessage.style.color =
          type === "error"
            ? "#d32f2f"
            : type === "success"
              ? "#388e3c"
              : "#7A1818";
        setTimeout(() => (elements.statusMessage.textContent = ""), 3000);
      }
      // ============================================

      // Global variable for pending delete or action
      let pendingAction = null; // 'delete' | 'reset' | 'uploadSheet'

      let sessionToDeleteId = null;
      let pendingUploadFile = null;

      function showConfirmModal(type, payload = null) {
        const titleEl = elements.confirmModal.querySelector(".confirm-title");
        const textEl = elements.confirmModal.querySelector(".confirm-text");
        const confirmBtn = elements.confirmDeleteBtn;

        if (type === "delete") {
          pendingAction = "delete";
          sessionToDeleteId = payload;
          titleEl.textContent = "Excluir conversa";
          textEl.textContent =
            "Tem certeza que deseja excluir esta conversa permanentemente? Esta ação não pode ser desfeita.";
          confirmBtn.textContent = "Excluir";
          confirmBtn.style.background = "var(--color-primary)";
        } else if (type === "reset") {
          pendingAction = "reset";

      function hideDeleteModal() {
        pendingAction = null;
        sessionToDeleteId = null;
        pendingUploadFile = null;
        elements.confirmModal.style.display = "none";
      }

      // Event Listeners for Modal
      elements.cancelDeleteBtn.addEventListener("click", hideDeleteModal);

      elements.confirmDeleteBtn.addEventListener("click", async () => {
        if (pendingAction === "delete" && sessionToDeleteId) {
          // Feedback visual
          const originalText = elements.confirmDeleteBtn.textContent;
          elements.confirmDeleteBtn.textContent = "Excluindo...";
          elements.confirmDeleteBtn.disabled = true;

          try {
            const success = await deleteSession(sessionToDeleteId);
            if (success) {
              // 1. Refresh list from server (removes deleted, updates order)
              sessions = await fetchSessions();

              // 2. Check if we deleted the current session
              if (currentSessionId === sessionToDeleteId) {
                if (sessions.length > 0) {
                  // Switch to the most recent (first) session
                  renderSessionList(); // Update list first
                  loadSession(sessions[0].session_id);
                } else {
                  // No sessions left -> Start New Chat
                  startNewChat();
                }
              } else {
                // We deleted a background session -> Just update list
                renderSessionList();
              }
            } else {
              setStatus("Erro ao excluir conversa.", "error");
            }
          } catch (e) {
            console.error("Delete handler error:", e);
            setStatus("Erro inesperado ao excluir.", "error");
          } finally {
            hideDeleteModal();
            // Restore button
            elements.confirmDeleteBtn.textContent = originalText;
            elements.confirmDeleteBtn.disabled = false;
          }
        } else if (pendingAction === "reset") {
          const deleteConvCheckbox = document.getElementById(
            "resetDeleteConversations",
          );
          const deleteConversations = !!(
            deleteConvCheckbox && deleteConvCheckbox.checked
          );
          hideDeleteModal();

          // Set special state so setLoading knows to update the Reset Button UI specifically
          pendingAction = "resetProcessing";

          setLoading(true);
          setStatus(
            deleteConversations
              ? "Reiniciando base de conhecimento e limpando conversas..."
              : "Reprocessando documentos (conversas preservadas)...",
            "warning",
          );

          const result = await resetRagDatabase({
            keepConversations: !deleteConversations,
          });

          setLoading(false); // Restore UI

          if (result && result.status === "success") {
            setStatus(
              result.message || "Memória RAG resetada com sucesso!",
              "success",
            );

            // REFRESH DATA (RESET INTERFACE)
            console.log("🔄 Refreshing app data after reset...");
            sessions = await fetchSessions(); // Update sidebar
            renderSessionList();
            if (deleteConversations) {
              startNewChat(); // Clear current view only if conversations were wiped
            }
          } else {
            setStatus("Erro ao resetar memória RAG.", "error");
          }
        } else if (pendingAction === "uploadSheet" && pendingUploadFile) {
          const file = pendingUploadFile;
          // Lê o mês de referência ANTES de fechar o modal (o input vive nele).
          const periodoInput = document.getElementById("uploadPeriodo");
          const periodo =
            periodoInput && periodoInput.value ? periodoInput.value : "";
          const MESES = [
            "Janeiro",
            "Fevereiro",
            "Março",
            "Abril",
            "Maio",
            "Junho",
            "Julho",
            "Agosto",
            "Setembro",
            "Outubro",
            "Novembro",
            "Dezembro",
          ];
          let rotulo = "";
          if (/^\d{4}-\d{2}$/.test(periodo)) {
            const [ano, mes] = periodo.split("-");

          hideDeleteModal();

          const origLabel = elements.uploadSheetBtn.innerHTML;
          elements.uploadSheetBtn.disabled = true;
          elements.uploadSheetBtn.innerHTML = `<i data-lucide="loader-2" class="animate-spin" style="width:12px; height:12px;"></i><span>Enviando...</span>`;
          if (window.lucide) lucide.createIcons();
          setStatus(

              : `Enviando ${file.name}...`,
            "warning",
          );

          try {
            const formData = new FormData();
            formData.append("file", file);
            if (periodo) formData.append("periodo", periodo);
            if (rotulo) formData.append("rotulo", rotulo);
            const response = await fetch(UPLOAD_SHEET_URL, {
              method: "POST",
              body: formData,
            });
            if (!response.ok) {
              const txt = await response.text().catch(() => "");
              throw new Error(txt || `HTTP ${response.status}`);
            }
            setStatus(
              rotulo
                ? `Planilha de ${rotulo} adicionada à linha do tempo.`
                : `Planilha "${file.name}" atualizada com sucesso.`,
              "success",

          } catch (err) {
            console.error("Sheet upload error:", err);
            setStatus(

      async function loadSession(sessionId) {
        console.log("📂 Loading session:", sessionId);

        // Clean up any temporary/empty sessions from list when switching
        if (currentSessionId !== sessionId) {
          sessions = sessions.filter((s) => !s._isTemp);
          renderSessionList();
        }

        currentSessionId = sessionId;
        clearChatArea();
        showSkeletonMessages();
        const history = await fetchHistory(sessionId);
        clearChatArea(); // Shows empty state by default

        if (history && history.length > 0) {
          hideEmptyState(); // Hide if we have content
          history.forEach((message) => renderMessage(message));
        } else {
          showEmptyState(); // Explicit show if empty
        }

        renderSessionList();
        elements.messageInput.focus();
      }
      function startNewChat() {
        console.log("➕ Starting new chat");

        // Avoid creating multiple temp sessions
        sessions = sessions.filter((s) => !s._isTemp);

        currentSessionId = generateUUID();
        clearChatArea();

        // Add temporary "Nova conversa" to session list
        const tempSession = {
          session_id: currentSessionId,
          titulo: "Nova conversa",
          data_inicio: new Date().toISOString(),
          _isTemp: true, // Helper flag
        };
        sessions.unshift(tempSession);

        renderSessionList();
        elements.messageInput.focus();
        setStatus("Nova conversa iniciada", "success");
      }
      async function handleSendMessage(e) {
        e.preventDefault();

        // CHECK FOR STOP ACTION
        if (isLoading) {
          // 1. Cancelar Geração de Texto
          if (abortController) {
            abortController.abort();
            abortController = null;
            setStatus("Geração interrompida.", "warning");
            hideTypingIndicator();
            setLoading(false);
          }
          // 2. Cancelar Upload
          if (uploadAbortController) {
            uploadAbortController.abort();
            uploadAbortController = null;
            setStatus("Upload cancelado.", "warning");
            hideTypingIndicator();
            setLoading(false);
          }
          return;
        }

        const message = elements.messageInput.value.trim();
        if (!message) return;

        // CHECK FOR EDIT ACTION
        if (isEditing) {
          const editingId = elements.inputForm.dataset.editingId;
          if (editingId) {
            console.log("✏️ Submitting Edit. Pruning from:", editingId);
            pruneHistoryFrom(editingId);
            // Clear edit state for next message
            cancelEdit();
          }
        }

        renderMessage({ role: "user", content: message });
        elements.messageInput.value = "";
        elements.messageInput.style.height = "auto";

        // Start loading (Change icon to Stop)
        setLoading(true);

        showTypingIndicator();

        let messageDiv = null;
        let contentDiv = null;

        const response = await sendMessage(
          message,
          currentSessionId,
          (chunkText) => {
            if ((!chunkText || chunkText.trim() === "") && !messageDiv) return;

            if (!messageDiv) {
              hideTypingIndicator();
              messageDiv = renderMessage({ role: "assistant", content: "" });
              contentDiv = messageDiv.querySelector(".message-content");
            }
            if (contentDiv) {
              // Update content actively via chunks
              contentDiv.innerHTML = marked.parse(chunkText);

              // Force new tab for links dynamically created in streams
              contentDiv.querySelectorAll("a").forEach((link) => {
                link.setAttribute("target", "_blank");
                link.setAttribute("rel", "noopener noreferrer");
              });

              elements.messagesContainer.scrollTop =
                elements.messagesContainer.scrollHeight;
            }
          },
        );

        if (!messageDiv) hideTypingIndicator();

        // Should only render if NOT aborted OR complete final render
        if (response !== "Geração cancelada.") {
          if (!messageDiv) {
            renderMessage({ role: "assistant", content: response });
          } else if (contentDiv) {
            // Final refresh with full componentized parsing
            contentDiv.innerHTML = parseAssistantHTML(response);
            contentDiv.querySelectorAll("a").forEach((link) => {
              link.setAttribute("target", "_blank");
              link.setAttribute("rel", "noopener noreferrer");
            });
            if (window.lucide) lucide.createIcons();
          }
          // As recomendações NÃO são mais extraídas do texto do chat.
          // Agora são geradas por IA (workflow dedicado embaplan-generate-recommendations)
          // e gravadas direto no banco — veja "Gerar com IA" na aba Recomendações.
        } else if (messageDiv) {
          // If cancelled while streaming, append feedback
          contentDiv.innerHTML += marked.parse(
            "\n\n*Geração cancelada pelo usuário.*",
          );
        }

        setLoading(false);

        // SYNC IDS FOR OPTIMISTIC MESSAGES
        // Fetch history to get Real IDs for the messages we just rendered optimistically
        try {
          const latestHistory = await fetchHistory(currentSessionId);
          if (latestHistory && latestHistory.length > 0) {
            // We only need to sync the last few messages
            // Strategy: Iterate backwards through DOM and History to match
            const domMessages = Array.from(
              elements.messagesContainer.querySelectorAll(".message"),
            );

            // Get last 2 user messages and last 2 assistant messages from DOM to be safe
            // (Usually just need the very last one of each)
            const lastDomMsg = domMessages[domMessages.length - 1];

            if (lastDomMsg) {
              // Find matching message in history based on content or role/time
              // Simple approach: Match the very last message of history to last ID-less DOM message
              const lastHistoryMsg = latestHistory[latestHistory.length - 1];

              if (lastHistoryMsg && !lastDomMsg.hasAttribute("data-id")) {
                lastDomMsg.setAttribute("data-id", lastHistoryMsg.id);
                console.log(
                  "🔄 Synced ID for last message:",
                  lastHistoryMsg.id,
                );
              }

              // Also check the user message before it (if it was optimistic)
              if (domMessages.length >= 2) {
                const userDomMsg = domMessages[domMessages.length - 2];
                const userHistoryMsg = latestHistory[latestHistory.length - 2];

                if (
                  userDomMsg &&
                  !userDomMsg.hasAttribute("data-id") &&
                  userHistoryMsg
                ) {
                  userDomMsg.setAttribute("data-id", userHistoryMsg.id);
                  console.log(
                    "🔄 Synced ID for user message:",
                    userHistoryMsg.id,
                  );
                }
              }
            }
          }
        } catch (e) {
          console.warn("Failed to sync message IDs:", e);
        }

        sessions = await fetchSessions();
        renderSessionList();
      }
      // Attach - IMPLEMENTED FILE UPLOAD
      elements.attachBtn.addEventListener("click", () =>
        elements.fileInput.click(),
      );
      elements.fileInput.addEventListener("change", async (e) => {
        const file = e.target.files[0];
        if (!file) return;

        // 1. Mostrar mensagem do usuário imediatamente (SÓ O PILL, SEM TEXTO VISIVEL)
        renderMessage({
          role: "user",
          content: `Enviando arquivo: ${file.name}`, // Mantém texto para histórico, mas UI oculta
          file: file.name,
        });

        console.log(
          "📤 Uploading file:",
          file.name,
          "Session:",
          currentSessionId,
        );
        setStatus(`Processando ${file.name}...`, "warning"); // Amarelo/Laranja enquanto processa
        isLoading = true;

        // Abort Controller para Upload
        uploadAbortController = new AbortController();

        showTypingIndicator();
        setLoading(true); // Ativa botão de stop

        try {
          const formData = new FormData();
          formData.append("file", file);

          if (currentSessionId) {
            formData.append("session_id", currentSessionId);
            formData.append("sessionId", currentSessionId);
          }

          const uploadUrlWithParam = currentSessionId
            ? `${UPLOAD_URL}?sessionId=${currentSessionId}`
            : UPLOAD_URL;

          const response = await fetch(uploadUrlWithParam, {
            method: "POST",
            body: formData,
            signal: uploadAbortController.signal,
          });

          if (!response.ok) throw new Error("Upload failed");

          const text = await response.text();
          let result = {};
          try {
            if (text && text.trim().length > 0) result = JSON.parse(text);
          } catch (e) {}

          hideTypingIndicator();

          // 2. SUCESSO: Mensagem verde
          setStatus(`${file.name} processado com sucesso!`, "success");

          // 3. CONFIRMAÇÃO LOCAL (Sem disparar agente)
          // O arquivo já foi processado pelo RAG, apenas confirmamos visualmente.
          renderMessage({
            role: "assistant",
            content: `✅ **Arquivo Recebido**\n\nO documento "${file.name}" foi processado. Você pode fazer perguntas sobre ele agora.`,
          });

          // OPCIONAL: Se o backend de upload não salvar histórico, o reload perderá essa mensagem.
          // Mas o usuário pediu explicitamente para não mandar msg pro agente.
        } catch (error) {
          if (error.name === "AbortError") {
            console.log("⏹️ Upload cancelado pelo usuário");
            // Não precisa fazer nada, o handler do botão stop já limpou UI
          } else {
            console.error("Upload error:", error);
            hideTypingIndicator();
            setStatus(`Erro ao processar ${file.name}`, "error");

            renderMessage({
              role: "assistant",
              content: `❌ **Falha no envio**\n\nNão foi possível processar o arquivo "${file.name}". Tente novamente.`,
            });
          }
        } finally {
          isLoading = false;
          uploadAbortController = null;
          setLoading(false); // Restaura botão send
          e.target.value = "";
        }
      });
      // Handle Enter to send, Shift+Enter for new line
      elements.messageInput.addEventListener("keydown", function (e) {
        if (e.key === "Enter" && !e.shiftKey) {
          e.preventDefault();
          handleSendMessage(e);
        }
      });

      // Auto-resize textarea
      elements.messageInput.addEventListener("input", function () {
        this.style.height = "auto";
        this.style.height = this.scrollHeight + "px";
      });
      // ============================================
      // INITIALIZATION
      // ============================================
      // Renamed from init -> startApp to imply it starts the heavy lifting
      // let appStarted = false; // Moved to top
      async function startApp() {
        if (appStarted) return; // Prevent double run
        appStarted = true;

        checkHealth();

        console.log("🚀 Starting App...");
        showSkeletonSessions();
        sessions = await fetchSessions();

        renderSessionList();

        // Tela inicial executiva: abre o painel automaticamente (Thay

        // já fechou o painel e voltou ao chat.
        try {
          if (!sessionStorage.getItem("dashShown")) {
            sessionStorage.setItem("dashShown", "1");

          }
        } catch (_) {
          /* sessionStorage indisponível em iframe sandbox — ignora */
        }
      }
      elements.sendBtn.addEventListener("click", handleSendMessage);
      if (elements.newChatBtn)
        elements.newChatBtn.addEventListener("click", startNewChat);

      // Toggle Sidebar
      const toggleSidebarBtn = document.getElementById("toggleSidebarBtn");

      // Close sidebar when clicking backdrop (mobile)

      // On mobile, start with sidebar closed

      // Check on load and resize
      checkMobileAndSetSidebar();

      window.addEventListener("resize", checkMobileAndSetSidebar);

      // ============================================
      // AD HISTORY / TIMELINE (Épico 1 do PRD)
      // ============================================
      const HISTORY_METRICS = {
        saude: {
          label: "Saúde 0–10",

                  `<div class="hs-card"><div class="hs-lbl">${escapeHtml(c.lbl)}</div><div class="hs-val ${c.cls}">${escapeHtml(String(c.val))}</div></div>`,
              )
              .join(""),
          ) +
          "</div>";
        if (window.lucide) lucide.createIcons();
      }

      // ----- View switching (Linha do tempo / Recomendações) -----
      function switchHistoryView(view) {
        document
          .querySelectorAll(".hv-tab")
          .forEach((t) =>
            t.classList.toggle("active", t.dataset.view === view),
          );
        document.getElementById("historyViewTimeline").style.display =
          view === "timeline" ? "" : "none";

      async function loadRecommendations(indice) {
        const body = document.getElementById("recsBody");
        body.innerHTML =
          '<div class="history-empty">Carregando recomendações…</div>';
        try {
          const resp = await fetch(
            `${RECS_URL}?indice=${encodeURIComponent(indice)}`,
            { cache: "no-store" },
          );
          if (!resp.ok) throw new Error("HTTP " + resp.status);
          const data = await resp.json();
          renderRecommendations(
            Array.isArray(data.recomendacoes) ? data.recomendacoes : [],
          );
        } catch (err) {
          body.innerHTML =
            '<div class="history-empty">Não foi possível carregar as recomendações.<br><small>' +
            (err && err.message ? err.message : "") +
            "</small></div>";
        }
      }

      function renderRecommendations(recs) {
        const body = document.getElementById("recsBody");
        if (!recs || recs.length === 0) {
          body.innerHTML =
            '<div class="history-empty">Nenhuma recomendação registrada para este anúncio ainda.</div>';
          return;
        }
        let html = "";
        recs.forEach((r) => {
          const origem = (r.origem || "agente").toLowerCase();
          const status = (r.status || "pendente").toLowerCase();
          const resultado = r.resultado
            ? `<span class="rec-result ${r.resultado}">${
                r.resultado === "funcionou"
                  ? "✅ funcionou"
                  : r.resultado === "piorou"
                    ? "❌ piorou"
                    : "➖ neutro"
              }</span>`
            : "";
          const alvo = r.metrica_alvo
            ? `<span class="rec-origin agente">🎯 ${r.metrica_alvo}</span>`
            : "";
          html += `<div class="rec-item" data-id="${r.id}">
            <div class="rec-item-top">
              <span class="rec-origin ${origem}">${origem === "usuario" ? "Você" : "Agente"}</span>
              <div class="rec-text">${escapeHtml(r.texto || "")}</div>
              <button class="rec-del-btn" data-action="delete" title="Apagar recomendação"><i data-lucide="trash-2"></i></button>
            </div>
            <div class="rec-meta">
              ${alvo}${resultado}
              <div class="rec-status-btns">
                <button class="rec-sbtn feito ${status === "feito" ? "active" : ""}" data-status="feito">✅ Feito</button>
                <button class="rec-sbtn pendente ${status === "pendente" ? "active" : ""}" data-status="pendente">⏳ Pendente</button>
                <button class="rec-sbtn descartado ${status === "descartado" ? "active" : ""}" data-status="descartado">❌ Descartado</button>
              </div>
            </div>
          </div>`;
        });
        body.innerHTML = emojiToSvg(html);
        if (window.lucide) lucide.createIcons();
      }

      function escapeHtml(s) {
        return String(s)
          .replace(/&/g, "&")
          .replace(/</g, "<")
          .replace(/>/g, ">");
      }

      async function setRecStatus(id, status, itemEl) {
        // optimistic UI
        itemEl
          .querySelectorAll(".rec-sbtn")
          .forEach((b) =>
            b.classList.toggle("active", b.dataset.status === status),
          );
        try {
          await fetch(REC_STATUS_URL, {
            method: "POST",
            headers: { "Content-Type": "application/json" },
            body: JSON.stringify({ id: Number(id), status }),
          });
        } catch (err) {
          console.error("Falha ao atualizar status da recomendação", err);
        }
      }

      async function addUserChange() {
        const input = document.getElementById("recsOtherInput");
        const texto = (input.value || "").trim();
        if (!texto || !historyState.indice) return;
        input.value = "";
        try {
          await fetch(USER_CHANGE_URL, {
            method: "POST",
            headers: { "Content-Type": "application/json" },
            body: JSON.stringify({
              anuncio_indice: historyState.indice,
              texto,
            }),
          });
          loadRecommendations(historyState.indice);
        } catch (err) {
          console.error("Falha ao registrar alteração do usuário", err);
        }
      }

      // Apaga uma recomendação (gestão manual no front).
      async function setRecDelete(id, itemEl) {
        if (!id) return;
        itemEl.style.opacity = "0.5";
        try {
          await fetch(REC_DELETE_URL, {
            method: "POST",
            headers: { "Content-Type": "application/json" },
            body: JSON.stringify({ id: Number(id) }),

          if (historyState.indice) loadRecommendations(historyState.indice);

      // Gera recomendações com IA (workflow dedicado) para o anúncio atual.
      // NÃO depende do chat — chama o webhook que usa IA e grava no banco.
      async function generateAiRecommendations() {
        const indice = historyState.indice;
        if (!indice) return;
        const btn = document.getElementById("recsGenBtn");
        const body = document.getElementById("recsBody");
        const original = btn.innerHTML;
        btn.disabled = true;
        btn.innerHTML = '<i data-lucide="loader-2"></i><span>Gerando…</span>';
        if (window.lucide) lucide.createIcons();
        body.innerHTML =
          '<div class="history-empty">A IA está analisando as métricas deste anúncio e gerando recomendações…</div>';
        try {
          const resp = await fetch(GEN_RECS_URL, {
            method: "POST",
            headers: { "Content-Type": "application/json" },
            body: JSON.stringify({ anuncio_indice: indice }),
          });
          if (!resp.ok) throw new Error("HTTP " + resp.status);
          await loadRecommendations(indice);
        } catch (err) {
          console.error("Falha ao gerar recomendações com IA", err);
          body.innerHTML =
            '<div class="history-empty">Não foi possível gerar recomendações agora.<br><small>' +
            (err && err.message ? err.message : "") +
            "</small></div>";

          if (window.lucide) lucide.createIcons();
